settings.heading: The Gift of SHIEH Beauty
settings.body: We believe great skin starts with clean, clinical formulas and a deep respect for nature. SHIEH was built on the principle that effective skincare should be honest, pure, and accessible to everyone.

settings.author: Sarah M.
settings.text: "SHIEH transformed my skin in just 4 weeks. My complexion has never looked more radiant or felt more balanced."

settings.author: James R.
settings.text: "The cleanser and serum duo is genuinely life-changing. Clean ingredients that actually work — rare find."

settings.author: Priya K.
settings.text: "Sensitive skin approved! Finally a brand I can trust without checking every single ingredient label."

settings.heading: Clean Science, Pure Results
settings.body: Every SHIEH formula is developed with dermatologists, tested for all skin types, and crafted from certified organic botanicals. We never compromise on purity.

settings.title: All Skin Types
settings.description: Formulated to work in harmony with every skin type — sensitive, oily, dry, and combination.

settings.title: Pure Organic
settings.description: Certified organic botanicals and clinically-proven actives from trusted global suppliers.

settings.title: Always Vegan
settings.description: 100% cruelty-free. No parabens, no sulphates. Kind to your skin and the planet.
